purpose: Optional bootstrap module for NVIDIA GPU support on Debian/Ubuntu/WSL2; detects GPU presence, installs nvtop and nvidia-container-toolkit, prints platform-appropriate setup guidance, and registers an SDXL inpainting checkpoint shim if present.
invariants: This module is opt-in only — never in DEFAULT_GROUPS; must be activated with --with optional-gpu
Does not auto-install the CUDA toolkit or any GPU ML frameworks — those are project/container scoped
The entire module is a no-op if nvidia-smi is not present (no GPU passthrough)
The SDXL checkpoint shim is only written if the HuggingFace cache directory already exists
gotchas: On WSL2, nvidia-smi absence message explicitly instructs using the Windows host driver; on native Linux the message points to the distro's NVIDIA package — the branch is determined by is_wsl()
manifest_add for nvidia-smi uses install_method 'windows-host-driver' on WSL and 'apt' on native Linux — callers must not assume a uniform install method for this tool
nvidia-container-toolkit requires resetting _APT_UPDATED=0 before calling apt_install to force a fresh apt-get update after adding the NVIDIA repo
docker runtime configuration (nvidia-ctk runtime configure) is skipped if docker daemon is not running at install time — operator must run it manually afterward
The sdxl-inpaint shim is a test -d script, not a real tool — it exists solely so devtools check and smoke-test can verify checkpoint presence via command -v

key_functions.name: optional_gpu_install
key_functions.summary: Detects GPU via nvidia-smi, branches on is_wsl() for absence messaging, installs nvtop and container toolkit, prints platform-appropriate setup guide, and records manifest entries

key_functions.name: optional_gpu_container_toolkit
key_functions.summary: Adds the NVIDIA apt repo, installs nvidia-container-toolkit, and configures the docker runtime if the daemon is running

key_functions.name: _optional_gpu_record_sdxl_inpaint
key_functions.summary: Writes a presence-check shim for the SDXL inpainting checkpoint and registers it in the manifest if the HuggingFace cache dir exists
